introSection:
Mine-Twister is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Remlinger Farms in Carnation, Washington, USA.

It opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! in 1997.
fullText:
Mine-Twister is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Remlinger Farms in Carnation, Washington, USA.

It opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! in 1997.
